name: Route 1 Rumors
design_note: Placeholder upgraded FireRed-style rumor layer. Real encounter tables arrive with the Route 1 wild encounter engine.

rumors.text: Red found unusual tracks cutting across the tall grass. They do not match the local daytime creatures.
Oak's instruments picked up starter migration energy near the first grass line.
Blue found a shortcut north, but the grass shifted behind him like something was watching.

future_encounter_groups.notes: Keep wild levels aligned with Brock pacing and expanded starter access.
Low-rate starter sightings should track early progression without breaking the first gym curve.
